summary: Full regression of Phase 1 (per-line tracking), Phase 2 (Universal Update notify) and Phase 3 (Shipments) plus auth, dashboard, pricing, settings, GST, public-OTP gates and security. Created /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_phase123.py with 33 tests — ALL PASS (33/33). Re-ran prior regression suites: test_iteration7_new_behaviors.py (17/17), test_iteration8_hot_leads_seed.py (clean), test_whatsapp_bot_flow.py 3/4 pass (1 pre-existing failure on variant-price assertion, unrelated to current scope). Frontend smoke verified login/public/admin shell visibility rules. STRICT-PHONE RULE honoured: the only outbound WhatsApp the suite can trigger is /orders/{oid}/notify on an order owned by Harsh Gujarati (+918200663263). Endpoint accepted the call structurally — actual delivery depends on whether templates were synced; not enforced here. No test send to any other phone. All TEST_ contacts/quotes/orders cleaned up.

minor.issue: Spec says 'webhook_url is non-empty in response' — it IS populated but as `whatsapp.webhook_url`, NOT a top-level `webhook_url`. Frontend already reads it from the nested path, so functionally OK; flagging in case the spec wording implied top-level.

When templates are not synced or BizChat returns 'Template for the selected language not found', the endpoint still returns 200 wrapped in a result object. The test treats this as a structural pass per other_misc_info. No real WA delivery validated.

test_whatsapp_bot_flow.py::test_full_flow_to_proforma FAILS on `assert '₹' in '6 mm² · ⌀5.3 · J=33'` — the variant list-row description no longer includes the price token. Either the test is stale or the bot dropped the ₹ formatting in the variant picker. Pre-existing from iter_8; main agent to confirm intent.

issues: Spec says button label is 'Toggle Priceless' — actual label is 'DEACTIVATE PRICELESS (600)' (with red border). Functionally correct (smart toggle by count) but label drift from spec wording.

Universal Update Templates section + 'Hide empty families' toggle exist further down the tab — initial-render innerText snapshot did not contain them. Visual confirmation needed by main agent (or scroll-to verification).

action_items: (optional) Investigate why WA bot variant picker dropped the ₹ price from variant row description — either restore it OR update test_whatsapp_bot_flow.py:187 to reflect intentional change.
(optional cosmetic) Either rename 'Deactivate Priceless' button to literal 'Toggle Priceless' to match spec wording, OR update the spec/QA scripts.
(no change required) webhook_url surfacing under whatsapp.webhook_url is fine; spec wording was ambiguous.
Carry-over from iter_7 (still open per code review): server.py is still huge — public-session endpoints should move into routers/public.py.
critical_code_review_comments: services/shipments.make_shipment_draft uses HTTPException for control flow inside a helper — fine in this scope but consider returning typed errors so the helper is unit-testable without the FastAPI request cycle.

routers/orders.py is now 599 lines — getting close to the 700-line ceiling. Phase 1 line-patch + Phase 2 notify endpoints sit alongside Phase 0 stage-advance helpers; consider splitting per-phase or per-domain (line_tracking.py, notifications.py).

Phase 3 dispatch_shipment doesn't block re-dispatching from `delivered` cleanly — it raises 400 only when stage in {dispatched, delivered}, but if delivered → dispatched downgrade ever happens (e.g. via patch_shipment), the line-status flip-back is not modelled. Edge case but worth a guard.

success_rate.backend: 33/33 (100%) on the iteration_9 suite. Plus 17/17 on iter_7 re-run, 3/4 on WA-bot suite (1 pre-existing). Overall ≈98%.
success_rate.frontend: smoke pass — login page (no admin hint), public catalogue (no Admin link), admin sidebar (no Coming Soon), Pricing Chart (priceless toggle present), Settings (WhatsApp + Catalogue tabs present). Universal-Update / Hide-empty-families needs scroll-level verification.

seed_data_creation: gujarat_quote_and_order fixture creates ONE TEST quote + ONE TEST order against the existing Harsh Gujarati contact, drives it through Phase 1/2/3, then DELETEs both at fixture teardown. seed-demo-data is invoked twice (idempotency check) and the demo contacts/quotes are cleaned up at end of TestDashboard. Live DB returned to clean state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration9_phase123.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iteration9.xml`. The fixture `gujarat_quote_and_order` depends on the Harsh Gujarati contact existing (phone_norm ending 8200663263); skip otherwise. Shipment endpoints expect content-type multipart for /upload (Form `doc_key` + File `file`). For Phase-2 notify, BizChat sync state will determine 200 ok vs 200 with template-not-found error in the body — either is a structural pass.
rca of the issue: No new RCA — iter_7 critical (duplicate DELETE /quotations route) is FIXED in current code: only one @router.delete handler exists at line 347; the stale one at line 216 is gone. The iter_7 failure no longer reproduces. The WA-bot variant ₹ drop is pre-existing and orthogonal to Phase 1/2/3 work.
